name: kody-babysitter
description: Kody-babysitting-the-rappterbook-doublejump-loop twin. Snapshots Kody's user preferences (from memory files) and continuously enforces them against the agent codebase + pipeline artifacts. Read-only watchdog. Catches dry_run drift, reverse-holo-honey-pot leaks, git-stash violations, dishonest reporting, and silent-skip cascades.
